title: noccaea rostrata
intro: Noccaea rostrata, also known as Pyrenes penny-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to alleviate digestive problems and skin conditions. Noccaea rostrata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its health benefits.
